raw_consumer_statement: I had tried to buy a gift card on XX/XX/year> at XXXX XXXX in the amount of {$1500.00}. I was charged for this purchase by the merchant but had never received any funds to the card and the card was never activated. I haven't received any product from this merchant that I was supposed to get. After trying to have the merchant resolve this, on XX/XX/year> I disputed this with the credit card company about never receiving any product that I had paid for and didnt get. The credit card company claims the merchant responded and gave me the gift cards, except there is no funds added to the gift card and the merchant took my money without giving me what I had purchased. No product Received. I have also submitted a receipt that shows it was not approved yet I was charged for this anyways.
